simple_types.name: Category_T
simple_types.code:
type Category_T is (LC_ALL,
                    LC_COLLATE,
                    LC_CTYPE,
                    LC_MESSAGES,
                    LC_MONETARY,
                    LC_NUMERIC,
                    LC_TIME);

subprograms.name: Locale_String
subprograms.code: function Locale_String (Locale : in Locale_T) return String

subprograms.name: Message
Open_Catalog
subprograms.code:
procedure Open_Catalog (Catalog   : in out Catalog_T;
                        With_Name : in     String)

subprograms.name: Set_Locale
Swap_Locale
subprograms.code:
procedure Swap_Locale (Category : in     Category_T;
                       Locale   : in out Locale_T)
